winner: I was typing so fast that my keyboard started spraying ink everywhere, but I just laughed it off—it's not every day you get a *key-spray* upgrade!

candidates.text: I was typing so fast that my keyboard started spraying ink everywhere, but I just laughed it off—it's not every day you get a *key-spray* upgrade!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative pun on 'key-spray,' concise, surprising, and naturally integrates both required words."}

candidates.text: I tried to type a haiku using my keyboard, but I kept getting sprayed by it. Turns out, I was pressing the wrong keys—specifically, the "spray" key that wasn't actually a thing.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative and includes both required words, but the concept of a 'spray key' feels forced and lacks specificity. The humor relies on a minor surprise, but it's not particularly funny or well-executed."}

candidates.text: I tried to use a keyboard that sprays perfume, but every time I typed "the" it made me smell like a flower shop.
I was typing a paper when my keyboard started spraying ink everywhere. Turns out, it wasn't a hardware issue—it was just the 'Shift' key with identity problems.
I just got a new keyboard, but I don't know how to use it. I tried spraying it with Windex, and now the 'A' key is sticky.
